evals.expected_output: HTML file at ./output/YYYY-MM-DD.html with 5-8 strategic AI news items
expectations: Output file exists at ./output/ with today's date in filename
HTML is valid and self-contained (inline CSS, no external deps)
Contains 'Frontier Labs Competition Update' section as the first content section
Frontier Labs section has at least 1 item
Total item count is between 5 and 8
Every item has all three parts: what happened, why it matters, what to watch
Every item includes at least one source link as clickable href
No items older than 48 hours are included
At least 2 of the 4 sections have content
No hype language (revolutionary, game-changing, unprecedented, etc.)

evals.prompt: Give me my morning AI update
evals.expected_output: Same HTML briefing — tests alternate trigger phrasing
expectations: Frontier Labs section present and first
Strategic analysis triple present on each item

evals.expected_output: Same HTML briefing — tests conversational trigger
expectations: Contains at least one Frontier Labs item
Analysis follows the what happened / why it matters / what to watch format
